calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner Patricia Mayer

The Court asked if the petitioner responded that she had nothing further to add. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Dec-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Compensation For Services As Personal Representative As Well As Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Mayer Doyle (Attorney/Petitioner) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it does not see how it is in the best interest of the estate that Ms. Doyle be compensated in both rolls (Attorney/Personal Representative). Ms. Doyle presented oral argument, and explained circumstances and the extent of services provided/performed to support her position with regard to receiving compensation for both rolls. The Court stated that it may be something more appropriate for extraordinary fees. The Petition to Approve Compensation for Services as Personal Representative and Attorney was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
